subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Deliver me from the surging seas of tribulation, and save me from the engulfing depths of calamities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ادرکنی فی غمار بحار البلایاء و انقذنی من غمرات طمطام الرزایاء و
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for the departed, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
